arch/sim.h File Reference

Provides an API for controlling the simulator at runtime. More...


Functions

int sim_is_simulator (void)
 Return true if the current program is running under a simulator, rather than on real hardware.
void sim_checkpoint (void)
 Checkpoint the simulator state to a checkpoint file.
unsigned int sim_get_tracing (void)
 Report whether or not various kinds of simulator tracing are enabled.
void sim_set_tracing (unsigned int mask)
 Turn on or off different kinds of simulator tracing.
void sim_dump (unsigned int mask)
 Request dumping of different kinds of simulator state.
void sim_print (const char *str)
 Print a string to the simulator stdout.
void sim_print_string (const char *str)
 Print a string to the simulator stdout.
void sim_command (const char *str)
 Execute a simulator command string.
int sim_set_shaping (unsigned shim, unsigned type, unsigned units, unsigned rate)
 Modify the shaping parameters of a shim.
void sim_enable_mpipe_links (unsigned mpipe, unsigned long link_mask)
 Enable a set of mPIPE links.
void sim_disable_mpipe_links (unsigned mpipe, unsigned long link_mask)
 Disable a set of mPIPE links.
void sim_profiler_enable (void)
 Turn profiling on for the current task.
void sim_profiler_disable (void)
 Turn profiling off for the current task.
void sim_profiler_set_enabled (int enabled)
 Turn profiling on or off for the current task.
int sim_profiler_is_enabled (void)
 Return true if and only if profiling is currently enabled for the current task.
void sim_profiler_clear (void)
 Reset profiling counters to zero for the current task.
void sim_profiler_chip_enable (unsigned int mask)
 Enable specified chip-level profiling counters.
void sim_profiler_chip_disable (unsigned int mask)
 Disable specified chip-level profiling counters.
void sim_profiler_chip_clear (unsigned int mask)
 Reset specified chip-level profiling counters to zero.
void sim_set_vcpu (int vcpu)
 Set vCPU number for a given task.
void sim_clear_vcpu (void)
 Clear vCPU status for a given task.

Detailed Description

Provides an API for controlling the simulator at runtime.
